title: 小宝英语平板学习包
source: Mini 端完整资料库生成；平板只接收已核验学习包

generatedBy.workflow: 资料核验 -> 读取平板记录 -> 计算掌握度 -> 生成学习计划 -> 下发平板学习包 -> 回收学习结果
generatedBy.fullMaterialLibrary: 留在 Mini 端，不随平板学习包全量下发
generatedBy.tabletPayload: 仅包含当前学习、近期复习、小漏洞回收所需的已核验内容

deliveryPolicy.miniRole: 资料中心、备课中心、计划中心
deliveryPolicy.resultReturn: 平板记录答题、小漏洞、跟读结果；联网后回传 Mini 或云端，再生成下一轮计划
deliveryPolicy.aiPolicy: 固定包先保证准确和离线可用；联网时再由 Mini/云端生成变式题，生成后仍需来源约束和规则校验

books.title: 三年级上册
books.status: 整本 OCR 完成，待二次识别和逐条核对后生成复习包

books.title: 三年级下册
books.status: 整本 OCR 完成，待二次识别和逐条核对后生成复习包

books.title: 四年级上册
books.status: 整本 OCR 完成，待二次识别和逐条核对后生成复习包

books.title: 四年级下册
books.status: 整本 OCR 完成，待二次识别和逐条核对后生成复习包

books.title: 五年级上册
books.status: 已核验 8/8 个单元并生成预习包

ocrAudit.principle: 完整课本资料库在 Mini 端管理；只有能在课本源文件中定位并经系统校验的单词、语句、语意、朗读文本，才会进入平板学习包。

current.timingRule: 按题量和预计耗时控制总量；孩子熟练时可提前完成，不强制学满时间。

steps.title: 旧知热身
steps.goal: 三四年级复习包未正式开放，先用五上已学旧知热身

steps.title: 预习课
steps.goal: 课程导入、英音领读、短语、句型、课文听读

steps.title: 轻练习
steps.goal: 确认刚学内容是否听懂、认得、能拼

steps.title: 小测收尾
steps.goal: 核心基础目标 100%，暂时没稳的点进入后续滚动复习

studyPackage.nextGenerationRule: 平板完成后回传小漏洞、稳定度、掌握度，Mini 端据此生成下一日学习包。

learningTracks.title: 三四年级已学总复习
learningTracks.purpose: 资料核对完成后，按单词、语句、课文场景、发音规则全册滚动复习

learningTracks.title: 五年级上册分部预习
learningTracks.purpose: 先像学校上课一样领读和理解，再做轻练习、小测和每日滚动

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到课本；中文词义按课本词汇表核对；课文句义按原句语境翻译。

previewLesson.goal: 理解 Yang Ling 和 Wang Bing 的好习惯与需要改进的习惯
previewLesson.scene: 本单元围绕日常好习惯展开，重点表达早起、刷牙、整理物品、记笔记、锻炼、晚睡等生活习惯。

story.en: Yang Ling has many good habits.
She does chores at home every day.
In class, she listens to her teachers carefully.
story.zh: 在课堂上，她认真听老师讲课。

story.en: She does well at school.
But she often reads in bed.
story.zh: 但是她经常在床上读书。

story.en: It is bad for her eyes.
Wang Bing has many good habits too.
He takes notes in class.
He puts his school things in order every evening.
story.zh: 他每天晚上把学习用品整理好。

story.en: He does exercise every day.
But Wang Bing often goes to bed late.
That is not a good habit.

sentences.en: Yang Ling has many good habits.
She does chores at home every day.
In class, she listens to her teachers carefully.
sentences.zh: 在课堂上，她认真听老师讲课。

sentences.en: She does well at school.
Yang Ling likes reading very much.
She reads a lot of books.
But she often reads in bed.
sentences.zh: 但是她经常在床上读书。

sentences.en: It is bad for her eyes.
Wang Bing has many good habits too.
He takes notes in class.
He puts his school things in order every evening.
sentences.zh: 他每天晚上把学习用品整理好。

sentences.en: He likes sport.
He does exercise every day.
He is strong and healthy.
But Wang Bing often goes to bed late.
That is not a good habit.
It is bad for his health.
What good habits should Yang Ling and Wang Bing have?
sentences.zh: 杨玲和王兵应该有什么好习惯？

schoolPractice.prompt: She ___ chores at home every day.
In class, she listens to her teachers ___.
He ___ his school things in order every evening.
But Wang Bing often goes to bed ___.

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到五上文本源；中文词义按课本词汇表核对。

previewLesson.goal: 理解 Helen Keller 从难过到开心的变化，并会表达情绪和能力
previewLesson.scene: 本单元通过 Helen Keller 的故事学习 worried, excited, hard, fast, give up 等表达。

story.en: Helen Keller cannot see or hear.
story.zh: 海伦·凯勒看不见也听不见。

story.en: She cannot talk with others.
Sometimes she feels angry and sad.
story.zh: 有时她感到生气和难过。

story.en: Her parents are worried.
Then Anne Sullivan comes to the family and teaches Helen.
story.zh: 后来安妮·沙利文来到这个家庭并教海伦。

story.en: She writes some words on Helen’s hand.
story.zh: 她在海伦的手上写一些单词。

story.en: But Helen does not understand.
Miss Sullivan does not give up.
One day, she puts water on Helen’s hand.
story.zh: 一天，她把水放到海伦的手上。

story.en: Then she writes W-A-T-E-R on her other hand.
story.zh: 然后她在海伦另一只手上写 W-A-T-E-R。

story.en: Helen understands!
She is excited.
Words are names for things!
Helen tries hard and learns fast.
story.zh: 海伦努力尝试，学得很快。

story.en: She also learns to speak!
She feels very happy.

sentences.en: Helen Keller cannot see or hear.
sentences.zh: 海伦·凯勒看不见也听不见。

sentences.en: Sometimes she feels angry and sad.
sentences.zh: 有时她感到生气和难过。

sentences.en: Miss Sullivan does not give up.
Helen tries hard and learns fast.
sentences.zh: 海伦努力尝试，学得很快。

sentences.en: She feels very happy.

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到五上文本源；中文词义按课本词汇表核对。

previewLesson.goal: 会说自己的兴趣爱好，并理解不同社团的意义
previewLesson.scene: 本单元围绕学校社团和兴趣爱好展开，重点练习 likes doing 和 wants to join。

story.en: I like paper-cutting.
Do you want to join it?
I’m not good at paper-cutting, but I like trying new things.
story.zh: 我不擅长剪纸，但我喜欢尝试新事物。

story.en: I also want to learn about Chinese culture.
I like dancing.
It keeps me healthy.
She likes singing.
It makes her happy.
He likes playing ping-pong.
He wants to join the Ping-pong Club.
He can make new friends there.
story.zh: 他可以在那里交新朋友。

story.en: She learns a lot from reading.

sentences.en: I like paper-cutting.
Do you want to join it?
I like dancing.
It keeps me healthy.
It makes her happy.
He likes playing ping-pong.

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到五上文本源；中文词义按课本词汇表核对。

previewLesson.goal: 会用 should / shouldn’t 描述安全和不安全的行为
previewLesson.scene: 本单元围绕校园和体育课安全，学习 run on the stairs, keep to the right, warm up 等表达。

story.en: It’s time for PE!
Let’s go to the sports ground!
You shouldn’t run on the stairs.
It’s not safe.
We should also keep to the right.
And we shouldn’t jump from the stairs.
story.zh: 而且我们不应该从楼梯上跳下来。

story.en: How can we keep safe in PE class?
story.zh: 我们怎样才能在体育课上保持安全？

story.en: We should warm up first.
We shouldn’t push others.
You may hurt him.
Let’s walk slowly.

sentences.en: You shouldn’t run on the stairs.
We should also keep to the right.
We should warm up first.
We shouldn’t push others.
You may hurt him.

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到五上文本源；中文词义按课本词汇表核对。

previewLesson.goal: 会询问并描述周末活动
previewLesson.scene: 本单元学习 usually, sometimes, often, always 等频率表达，以及周末活动短语。

story.en: Today is Friday!
What do you do at weekends, Yang Ling?
I usually visit my grandparents.
story.zh: 我通常看望我的祖父母/外祖父母。

story.en: I help them water the plants.
Sometimes I go climbing with my parents.
I also like spending time with my family.
story.zh: 我也喜欢和家人共度时光。

story.en: I usually chat with them on the internet at weekends.
story.zh: 我通常在周末和他们在网上聊天。

story.en: What else do you do at weekends?
I often play football with Liu Tao.
Sometimes I fly a kite in the park.
She always plays the piano.
Sometimes she goes to the cinema with her friends.
story.zh: 有时她和朋友去看电影。

story.en: We all have fun at weekends.
story.zh: 我们周末都玩得很开心。

sentences.en: What do you do at weekends, Yang Ling?
I usually visit my grandparents.
sentences.zh: 我通常看望我的祖父母/外祖父母。

sentences.en: Sometimes I go climbing with my parents.
I often play football with Liu Tao.
She always plays the piano.

schoolPractice.prompt: Sometimes I fly a kite in the ___.

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到五上文本源；中文词义按课本词汇表核对。

previewLesson.goal: 理解六尺巷故事，会表达建议和友好相处
previewLesson.scene: 本单元通过六尺巷故事学习 neighbour, space, letter, advice, friendly 等表达。

story.en: The Wu family live next to the Zhang family.
The Wu family want to take the space between their houses.
story.zh: 吴家想占用两家房子之间的空地。

story.en: Your house is too close to our house!
story.zh: 你们的房子离我们家太近了！

story.en: The Zhang family feel very angry.
Why don’t we write a letter to Zhang Ying?
story.zh: 我们为什么不给张英写封信呢？

story.en: He can give good advice.
Zhang Ying writes a letter back.
A wall is not important.
We should be friendly.
Why not move our wall back three chi ?
story.zh: 为什么不把我们的墙后移三尺呢？

story.en: You can use the space.
story.zh: 你们可以使用这块空地。

story.en: You’re so kind.
The Wu family and the Zhang family become good neighbours.
story.zh: 吴家和张家成了好邻居。

story.en: This is the story of Liu Chi Xiang.

sentences.en: The Wu family live next to the Zhang family.
The Zhang family feel very angry.
Why don’t we write a letter to Zhang Ying?
sentences.zh: 我们为什么不给张英写封信呢？

sentences.en: We should be friendly.
Why not move our wall back three chi ?
sentences.zh: 为什么不把我们的墙后移三尺呢？

schoolPractice.prompt: The Wu family live next to the Zhang ___.

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到五上文本源；中文词义按课本词汇表核对。

previewLesson.goal: 会用购物常用语询问、试穿、询价和做选择
previewLesson.scene: 本单元通过 Yang Ling 购物学习 Can I help you?, How much is it?, try it on 等表达。

story.en: Yang Ling and her parents are shopping.
story.zh: 杨玲和她的父母正在购物。

story.en: Yang Ling has a shopping list and wants to buy things with her pocket money.
story.zh: 杨玲有一张购物清单，想用自己的零花钱买东西。

story.en: Can I help you?
I’d like a sweater.
Would you like this yellow one?
How about this pink sweater?
Can I try it on?
It looks good.
How much is it?
It’s sixty-eight yuan.
Let’s take it.
They’re not on my shopping list.
story.zh: 它们不在我的购物清单上。

story.en: These socks look nice.
They’re twelve yuan a pair.
I don’t need four pairs.
Two pairs, please.

sentences.en: Can I help you?
I’d like a sweater.
Can I try it on?
How much is it?
They’re twelve yuan a pair.

verification.note: 英文词句逐条定位到五上文本源；中文词义按课本词汇表核对。

previewLesson.goal: 会介绍春节和圣诞节的时间及庆祝方式
previewLesson.scene: 本单元学习 festival, January, February, December, red packet, lion dance 等节日表达。

story.en: The Spring Festival, or Chinese New Year, is very important for Chinese people.
story.zh: 春节，也就是中国新年，对中国人来说非常重要。

story.en: It is in January or February.
Before the festival, my family and I clean our house and put fu on our doors.
story.zh: 节日前，我和家人打扫房子，并把福字贴在门上。

story.en: On Chinese New Year’s Eve, we have a big dinner at home.
story.zh: 在除夕夜，我们在家吃一顿丰盛的晚餐。

story.en: We eat jiaozi .
Su Yang and I get red packets from our parents and grandparents.
story.zh: 苏洋和我从父母、祖父母/外祖父母那里收到红包。

story.en: On Chinese New Year’s Day, we watch a lion dance.
story.zh: 在大年初一，我们观看舞狮。

story.en: We all have a good time at this festival.
story.zh: 我们在这个节日都过得很开心。

story.en: Christmas is a big festival in the UK.
story.zh: 圣诞节是英国的一个大节日。

story.en: It is in December.
Before Christmas, we buy gifts for our family and friends.
story.zh: 圣诞节前，我们给家人和朋友买礼物。

story.en: We also buy a Christmas tree.
On Christmas Eve, Helen and I hang stockings on our beds.
story.zh: 在平安夜，海伦和我把圣诞袜挂在床上。

story.en: We get up early and open our gifts.
story.zh: 我们早早起床并打开礼物。

story.en: Christmas is fun!

sentences.en: The Spring Festival, or Chinese New Year, is very important for Chinese people.
sentences.zh: 春节，也就是中国新年，对中国人来说非常重要。

sentences.en: It is in January or February.
We all have a good time at this festival.
sentences.zh: 我们在这个节日都过得很开心。

sentences.en: Christmas is a big festival in the UK.
sentences.zh: 圣诞节是英国的一个大节日。

sentences.en: It is in December.
